title: WattEV Accelerates Freight Electrification with Three New Megawatt Charging Depots in Southern California
content: WattEV will install 29 megawatt chargers across Otay Mesa (7), Baker (10), and the Port of Long Beach (12), supporting up to 100,000 annual charging sessions and enabling <30-minute electric truck refueling. Backed by $24M from the California Transportation Commission, the sites use proprietary SST technology and support WattEVâ€™s TaaS model, which delivers 200,000+ zero-emission freight miles monthly.
author: Analysts Account
